headline: Huntington Ingalls Tests Physical AI Welding To Shift Shipyard Economics
summary: Huntington Ingalls Industries (NYSE:HII) has signed a memorandum of understanding with Path Robotics to explore integrating physical AI and autonomous welding into its shipbuilding operations. The collaboration focuses on applying advanced AI-driven welding automation to HII's industrial workflows to support future shipbuilding programs. The agreement outlines a framework for testing and potentially scaling Path Robotics' autonomous welding systems within HII facilities. For you as an...
